nodes.label: Email Runtime
nodes.summary: Email capability via nodemailer backend dependency, available for notification or operational delivery features.

nodes.label: wx-login (WeChat OAuth)
nodes.summary: WeChat OAuth login interface (code2session): miniprogram calls wx.login() to get a temporary code, backend exchanges it for openid and session_key, then issues a JWT token.

nodes.label: WeChat Token API
nodes.summary: WeChat access_token and JSAPI ticket APIs used by wechat-jssdk.service.js to sign URLs for WeChat web capabilities.

nodes.label: WeChat Pay API
nodes.summary: WeChat Pay unified-order API and callback flow; payment.service.js builds XML requests and MD5 signatures, routes accept callbacks and update Payment and Enrollment state.

nodes.label: wx-subscribe (Subscription Message)
nodes.summary: WeChat subscription message push interface; study-reminder.service.js calls it daily at 05:45/06:00 to push study reminders to subscribed users.

nodes.label: Backend Services
nodes.summary: Integration-owning backend service modules under backend/src/services/ wrapping WeChat login, JSSDK, payment, subscription messages, and other outbound effects.

nodes.label: WeChat Login API (code2session)
nodes.summary: WeChat login API used in production to exchange a temporary wx.login code for openid and session_key; wechat.service.js maps error codes to user-facing failures.

nodes.label: wx-payment (WeChat Payment)
nodes.summary: WeChat payment flow: payment.service.js creates orders and returns pre-pay parameters, miniprogram calls wx.requestPayment(), WeChat callbacks backend to verify signature and update order status.

nodes.label: WeChat JS-SDK
nodes.summary: WeChat JS-SDK for web authorization and sharing; backend wechat-jssdk.service.js generates signature tickets, frontend uses it to configure share cards and other WeChat native capabilities.

nodes.label: Miniprogram WeChat Client APIs
nodes.summary: WeChat client APIs invoked from the miniprogram runtime including wx.login, wx.request, wx.uploadFile, wx.requestPayment, wx.requestSubscribeMessage, wx.connectSocket, storage, navigation, and system APIs.

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant Architecture
nodes.summary: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with shared MongoDB database, tenant isolation via tenantId field, AsyncLocalStorage context propagation, and Mongoose plugin auto-injection of tenant filters.

nodes.label: wechat-jssdk.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that retrieves WeChat access_token and JSAPI ticket, then signs URLs for WeChat web capabilities.

nodes.label: payment.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that builds WeChat Pay XML requests and MD5 signatures, creates payment orders, and handles callback verification.

nodes.label: wechat.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that exchanges wx.login code for openid/session_key and maps WeChat error codes to user-facing login failures.

nodes.label: study-reminder.service.js
nodes.summary: Backend service that sends daily study reminder notifications via WeChat subscription messages at 05:45 and 06:00.

nodes.label: AsyncLocalStorage (ALS)
nodes.summary: Node.js AsyncLocalStorage used to propagate tenantId context through the request lifecycle without manual parameter passing.

nodes.label: Mongoose Tenant Plugin
nodes.summary: Mongoose plugin that automatically reads tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage and injects it as a filter condition on all queries.

nodes.label: Tenant Collection
nodes.summary: MongoDB collection mapping wxAppId to tenantId, used during login to resolve which tenant a miniprogram belongs to.

nodes.label: JWT Token
nodes.summary: JWT issued after WeChat login, carrying tenantId so subsequent requests can identify the tenant context.

nodes.label: Nodemailer
nodes.summary: Node.js email library used as the backend email dependency for notification or operational delivery.

edges.relation: is available as notification channel within
